test_backend.command: cd backend && uv run pytest -v -k 'not (TestLongTermMemory or test_long_term)'
test_backend.notes: 163 passed, 4 deselected (pre-existing OPENAI_API_KEY failures documented in AGENTS.md)

typecheck.notes: tsc + vite build succeeded, 1989 modules transformed

lint.notes: 14 errors all pre-existing (verified identical count at commit 47e74ff before smart-sessions milestone). No new lint errors introduced.

nonBlockingIssues.description: LLM provider instantiation code (~30 lines) is duplicated between _infer_session_name and _call_summarization_llm in ws_handler.py. Should be extracted to a shared _get_llm_agent() helper method.
nonBlockingIssues.suggestion: Extract a _get_llm_agent() method on ActiveSession that returns a configured pydantic_ai.Agent based on self.config.model_provider

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about pre-existing lint errors: 'Pre-existing: 14 ESLint errors (react-hooks/refs, react-refresh/only-export-components, react-hooks/set-state-in-effect, react-hooks/immutability, no-empty) exist in AppLayout.tsx, SettingsPage.tsx, MainTab.tsx, useTTSPlayer.ts, useWebSocket.ts, badge.tsx, button.tsx, tabs.tsx, AppContext.tsx. These are not from mission work and should not block validation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 6 features in smart-sessions milestone reported the same 14 pre-existing lint errors. Verified by checking lint output at commit 47e74ff (before smart-sessions) showing identical error count and locations.

reviewMethod: Self-review by scrutiny-validator (scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagents failed due to execution permission issues)
